title: Gloomy Limbo
description: Gloomy Limbo is a horror mod that adds one new dimension of limbo. Limbo is a black and white dimension where only you exist or not? Sometimes you will feel like a silhouette is watching you
body: ![logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/409171012059230dc5558e10c5b1f10581470bc7_0.webp)The mod adds a one-new dimension Limbo, you can get into it with the help of a black bed, by pushing the limb you will see a very dark dimension with its new mechanics like strangulation in caves, to get the first light you will have to work hard, but the mod affects the construction with the mod you will have even more blocks for variety of its buildings
